title: Pura Collagen Powdered Supplement Glow+, 10,000mg Hydrolysed Peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamins & Minerals, 28 Servings, 284 g
features: 💛 WHY TAKE A COLLAGEN SUPPLEMENT BLEND? Collagen is an essential protein giving structure to our skin, hair and nails. If you take away the water hydrating it, 70 – 80% of our skin is collagen. Natural collagen production reduces with age. Supplementing your diet with 10,000mg of Glow+ every day can lead to healthier skin, hair and nails in as little as 4 weeks.

💛 IMPROVE YOUR SKIN - Glow+ helps reduce deep lines and wrinkles and increase your skin’s elasticity for noticeably firmer and smoother skin. Also shown to reduce the appearance of cellulite, after prolonged use.

💛 BOOST HAIR AND NAILS – Our unique blend of collagen peptides, vitamins and minerals is formulated to stimulate hair follicles for fuller, more nourished and healthier hair. Glow+ also helps improve the strength and length of your nails.

💛 ADVANCED COLLAGEN PEPTIDES – the VERISOL Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides within Glow+ are Bioactive Collagen Peptides. When ingested, your digestive system transfers it into the bloodstream which carries it throughout your body as amino acids. This process also stimulates your own body to create more collagen where it’s needed.

💛 HIGHEST QUALITY INGREDIENTS - Glow+ contains Hyaluronic Acid which is essential for skin cell rejuvenation, Biotin - a building block of hair, and a blend of vitamins and minerals such as Vitamin C and D. Glow+ is Keto friendly, Non GMO, Lactose Free and blended right here in the UK.
description: Product Description Pura Collagen glow+ is a unique, innovative formula that combines a powerful blend of ingredients to naturally enhance the body’s own collagen production and to reduce the effects of ageing. If you’re searching for the best collagen powder for skin and hair, Pura Collagen Glow+ delivers. It reduces the signs of ageing and naturally enhances your own collagen production. Each tub contains 28 daily servings of 10,000mg VERISOL Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides, 50mg Hyaluronic Acid and other beneficial ingredients. Ingredients VERISOL® Hydrolysed Bovine Collagen Peptides 10,000mg, Hyaluronic Acid 50mg, Vitamin C 80mg, Vitamin D 10µg, Biotin 50µg, Selenium 30µg, Zinc 5mg Safety Warning Do not exceed recommended daily dose. Food supplements should not be used as a substitute for a varied / healthy diet. Keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Pura Collagen Limited, 1 High Street, Chalfont St Peter, Gerrards Cross, SL9 9QE See more
